Resolves #11799
Related: #11796

Authored by Claude Opus 4.7 (Claude Code). Session db6af029-1dd4-4a06-9788-06f911526b6b.

FAIR-band: in-band — author was the natural lane per Epic #11796 graduation; cross-family review at PR-merge gate per `pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1`.

Evidence: L1 (substrate prose amendment + structural anchor audit + Map/World Atlas extraction). L1 required for #11799 ACs (all 10 ACs are textual presence/absence checks against the merged files). No residuals — the cross-family substrate review by `@neo-gpt` IS the evidence collection for substrate-semantic correctness.

Substrate amendment to `ideation-sandbox-workflow.md §6` per Epic **#11796** (graduated from Discussion **#11793**). Replaces hardcoded "3× explicit APPROVED cross-family signals" with a **family-keyed, membership-derived quorum**. Introduces a new `AUTHOR_SIGNAL` signal type (4-bullet inline summary) and tiered floor (Tier 1 floor-2 active families; Tier 2 additionally requires `## Unresolved Liveness` + `revalidationTrigger` AC). Source-of-truth substrate — sibling mirror PRs #11808 / #11809 (and PR #11806 for `identityRoots.mjs`) follow this merged shape.

## Substrate-Mutation Slot-Rationale (per pull-request-workflow.md §1.1)

This PR touches `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/**` — slot-rationale enumeration mandatory:

**Added section: `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/audits/consensus-mandate.md` (NEW FILE)**
- **Disposition:** `keep` (reference-grade context loaded on-demand via one-line pointers from main workflow per Map/World Atlas discipline #11319 / #11320).
- **3-axis rating:**
  - Trigger-frequency: **LOW** — loaded only when reader needs full template / empirical anchors / two-axis substrate detail / version-binding examples / same-family aggregation full rationale / author-actions full sequence / signal-pattern definitions.
  - Failure-severity: **LOW** — missing reference context = annoyance for reader, not operational break (operational rule statements stay inline in `references/ideation-sandbox-workflow.md §6`).
  - Enforceability: **MEDIUM** — pointer presence is reader-visible, not mechanically checked at boot; readers landing in `references/ideation-sandbox-workflow.md` see the `audits/consensus-mandate.md §<anchor>` pointer and can load on-demand.
- **Rationale for keep over compress-to-trigger:** the audits file IS the compress-to-trigger destination; what was previously inline-substrate (§6.6 template, §6.8 axis-substrate, §6.9 empirical anchors, §6.10 30-day validation, §quorum-rule full rationale, §same-family-aggregation full rule, §author-actions full sequence, §signal-patterns-table full definitions, §version-binding examples) is now keep-in-audits, loaded only when referenced.

**Modified section: `.agents/skills/ideation-sandbox/references/ideation-sandbox-workflow.md` §5.1 + §6.2 / §6.3 / §6.4 / §6.5 / §6.6 / §6.7 / §6.9 / §6.10**
- **Disposition delta:** `keep` → `keep` (main workflow stays operational; rule statements inline) BUT the file went through aggressive prose compression to land under the `ideation-sandbox.perFilePayloadBudget = 25000B` cap.
- **Reason for the shift:** initial amendment (commit `fb4b63277`) pushed the file from 24KB → 29.5KB, tripping the `lint-skill-manifest` per-file budget cap. Refactor commit `767f6ea3d` extracted reference-grade content to the new audits file via Map/World Atlas split per the lint guidance + #11319 / #11320 convention. Net result: 24841B (159B under cap). Rule semantics unchanged — all extracted content reachable via one-line pointers.
- **3-axis rating (modified-section is the §6 consensus mandate):**
  - Trigger-frequency: **HIGH** — turn-loaded at every agent boot via skill router.
  - Failure-severity: **HIGH** — mis-cited quorum rule causes incorrect graduation gates.
  - Enforceability: **HIGH** — `lint-skill-manifest` enforces byte-budget per-PR; `pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1` Axis-2 reviewer-verification of Signal Ledger; consensus-gate is itself the substrate this PR amends.

**Retired:** no sections retired; content extracted-not-removed.

**Net substrate accretion impact:** main workflow file +841B (from 24000B → 24841B); new audits file +11189B (created); total +12030B substrate added across the skill. Justified by: (a) family-keyed quorum rule is a substantive correctness fix vs the stale "3×" snapshot; (b) audits-file load-runtime-effect is on-demand only, not turn-loaded; (c) Map/World Atlas split keeps operational-substrate density correct.

## Substrate Changes Summary

- **§6.2** — Quorum rule (one-paragraph + 4-bullet inline signal-pattern summary; full table in audits §signal-patterns-table). Tiered floor explicit.
- **§6.3** — AUTHOR_SIGNAL version-binding mentioned; full examples in audits §version-binding-examples.
- **§6.4** — Same-family aggregation rule (one-paragraph summary; full rule in audits §same-family-aggregation).
- **§6.5** — Placeholder replaced with concrete rule + Tier-2 `revalidationTrigger` reference.
- **§6.6** — Four required sections named; canonical markdown template in audits §template-block.
- **§6.7** — Precondition for AUTHOR_SIGNAL pre-poll + 4-step graduation sequence summary; full sequence in audits §author-actions.
- **§6.8 / §6.9 / §6.10** — One-line pointers to audits §axis-substrate / §empirical-anchors / §post-merge-validation.
- **§5.1** — Graduation-block cross-ref updated to reference §6.2 quorum rather than stale "3×".
